title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS - 211info
text: REGENCE CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 4430 N Trenton Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2:15pm-6:15pm Summer Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 853-8678 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 853-8678 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Shares campus with Rosa Parks Elementary School Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REGENCE CLUB
